item.title: Version 1.0.19
item.description: List view now has an Up-a-folder button at the top to go back a level. The corner hint now spells out Shift+click to collect. (Delete verified end to end with native and WebKit tests.)

item.title: Version 1.0.18
item.description: Shift+click now collects any folder or file straight into the delete queue — in the sunburst, treemap AND list (same as right-click to Collect), so you can queue many items fast without navigating. Hold-and-drag to select a run in the list is more reliable too.

item.title: Version 1.0.17
item.description: Diskito now asks for the access it needs: on launch it triggers macOS's native Downloads/Desktop/Documents permission prompts, and if it still cannot delete it shows a clear Full Disk Access guide with a one-click shortcut to the setting and a recheck button — no more digging through System Settings.

item.title: Version 1.0.16
item.description: Diagnostics for delete failures (writes the exact reason to a log so permission issues can be pinpointed).

item.title: Version 1.0.15
item.description: Restored instant open: deleting no longer forces a full disk re-scan on the next launch, so the app opens immediately again (the background re-scan keeps everything up to date).

item.title: Version 1.0.14
item.description: List multi-select now works for real: hold and drag across rows to select a run, or Shift-click to select a range. Small sizes now show as MB/KB instead of '0.0 GB', and the session panel shows how many items you moved to the Trash.

item.title: Version 1.0.13
item.description: Added an always-visible Empty Trash button (showing the current Trash size) in the bottom bar, so you can permanently free the space anytime — not just from the cleanup categories.

item.title: Version 1.0.12
item.description: Fixed a serious bug: deleting files in protected folders (Downloads, Desktop, Documents) could silently fail yet look successful, so items reappeared after a restart. Diskito now removes only what truly reached the Trash and, when macOS blocks a delete, tells you to grant Full Disk Access with a shortcut to the setting. The scan cache is also cleared after changes so a relaunch never brings deleted files back.

item.title: Version 1.0.11
item.description: List view now refreshes instantly after deleting. Drag across rows, or Shift-click, to select many files at once. New Undo to put the last cleanup back from the Trash (Empty Trash still frees the space for good).

item.title: Version 1.0.10
item.description: You can now paste (Cmd+V) your license key — added a standard Edit menu so copy, paste, cut and select-all work throughout the app.

item.title: Version 1.0.9
item.description: List view no longer scrolls back to the top when you select an item. Deleting no longer asks for Keychain access. Clearer, more readable license-key field.

item.title: Version 1.0.8
item.description: Clearer in-app hint explaining how to open a folder and how to collect items (right-click or the + button).

item.title: Version 1.0.7
item.description: Easier folder cleanup: right-click any folder in the sunburst, treemap or list to collect it whole or open it. Treemap and list cells now show a quick + button. Replaced the floating collect button that was hard to click.

item.title: Version 1.0.6
item.description: Opening is now instant after the first scan: Diskito shows your last scan immediately and refreshes it in the background. The first scan is parallelized (faster), and the loading screen now shows live progress — files and GB found as it works.

item.title: Version 1.0.5
item.description: The app can no longer get stuck on the Scanning your disk screen: if loading the scan ever fails or takes too long, it now shows a Retry instead of an endless spinner, and any internal error is logged so it can be diagnosed.

item.title: Version 1.0.4
item.description: You can now add a whole folder to the cleanup queue directly from the map: hover any folder in the sunburst or treemap and click Collect folder (the list view already has a + per row). Deleting a folder moves the entire folder to the Trash in one operation instead of its thousands of individual files.

item.title: Version 1.0.3
item.description: Fixes a near-freeze when collecting a huge number of files at once (e.g. a node_modules folder with tens of thousands of files) and makes Clear all instant — the collector now renders a capped preview with the full count instead of one row per file.

item.title: Version 1.0.2
item.description: The Largest view now shows the biggest files across your whole disk, not just the current folder — with a top-10 list and a Load more button, and a clear scope header.

item.title: Version 1.0.1
item.description: Fixes the Pro unlock: it is now a real Gumroad license-key activation (enter your key to unlock) instead of a placeholder, plus honest pricing copy and brand fixes.
